svg.text: Fig. 5-style inspection redraw: conservative native PAF nb:i:1 -> sweepGA 1:1, no scaffold
Rows are child/query chromosome ends; p-arm tracks are left and q-arm tracks right within each pedigree pair. Fill color encodes target/parent arm; purple outline marks inter-chromosomal mappings.
Inspection output only. This redraw does not replace submission/fig/MainFigures/Fig5_pedigree_untangle.pdf or edit the manuscript.
